mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, icon_url, required_hours, badge_level, created_at FROM achievement ORDER BY required_hours ASC

SELECT a.id AS achievement_id, a.name, a.description, a.icon_url, a.badge_level, a.required_hours, ua.unlocked_at FROM user_achievement ua INNER JOIN achievement a ON a.id = ua.achievement_id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.required_hours ASC
